CustomField.description: NUM-2886 Statuts terminés = (select * from CS_INCIDENT_STATUSES_B where close_flag='Y')
CustomField.formula: OR(ISPICKVAL(Status,"115"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"116"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"2"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"4"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"101"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"51"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"104"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"106"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"108"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"109"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"110"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"111"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"112"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"113"), ISPICKVAL(Status,"114"))
CustomField.label: Est clos
